description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should test SQLAlchemy versions 2.0.18 and above on various Python and ClickHouse versions. Use a matrix strategy to run tests on ubuntu-20.04 with different Python versions, ClickHouse versions, and SQLAlchemy versions. For each test, check out the code, set up Python, install test requirements, install SQLAlchemy, configure the test environment, start a ClickHouse server container, and run tests with a timeout.
